title: ischaemum binatum
intro: Ischaemum binatum, also known as the two-leafed vetiver or Thai vetiver, is a species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ischaemum binatum include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of Ischaemum binatum include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
